about.title: About me
about.paragraph1: Hello, my name is Abdullin Shamil, and this site is my project.
about.paragraph2: I use collection from database of the Art Institute of Chicago.
about.paragraph3: I create it for artists and those, who interested in art.
about.paragraph4: I hope you will enjoy it.
